creator: peter@vereshagin.org
text:
while my portupgrade i met the problem of missing header, the IexMacros.h missing.
Ok, i supplied the header from 1.4.0 sources and it compiled like a charm.
Not sure if this is the FreeBSD-specific but looks just reasonable to mention it here.

Fix: 

Copy the missing IexMacros.h header from previous 1.4.0 stable OpenEXR.
How-To-Repeat: 1. update OpenEXR port to 1.6.1
2. Try to compile on RELENG_7 system
